name: Death by Vanilla Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak tapioca in 2 cups cold water in refrigerator overnight.
2. Drain and place in a large saucepan with cream and 2 cups water.
3. Bring to a boil, then add sugar and vanilla slowly, stirring continuously (it will thicken quickly).
4. Beat eggs to a froth, then add to pudding mixture.
5. Simmer for 5 minutes until eggs are set with the rest of the pudding.
6. Chill overnight in the refrigerator.
7. Serve chilled or warm each serving in the microwave. Enjoy this rich vanilla pudding and savor every bite!
